mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diagnosis (child_id, owner_id, scale_id, input_summary, dimensions, draft, finalized_content, status) VALUES (#{childId}, #{ownerId}, #{scaleId}, #{inputSummary}, #{dimensions}, #{draft}, #{finalizedContent}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, child_id, owner_id, scale_id, input_summary, dimensions, draft, finalized_content, status FROM diagnosis WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, child_id, owner_id, scale_id, input_summary, dimensions, draft, finalized_content, status FROM diagnosis WHERE child_id = #{childId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE diagnosis SET dimensions = #{dimensions}, draft = #{draft} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE diagnosis SET draft = #{draft} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE diagnosis SET finalized_content = #{content}, status = 'FINALIZED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
